overview: The item appears to be a freshwater mussel shell, likely from a Triangleshell Mussel (Sinohyriopsis cumingii). The shell features a distinct iridescent lining known as nacre or mother-of-pearl. These shells are frequently utilized in the production of cultured freshwater pearls. iNaturalist +2 3 sites Triangleshell Mussel (Sinohyriopsis cumingii) · iNaturalist Triangleshell Mussel (Sinohyriopsis cumingii) · iNaturalist.
